title: Combining offices of treasurer and clerk of police jury
doc_html:
§1664.  Combining offices of treasurer and clerk of police jury

The police jury may combine the offices of parish treasurer and clerk of the police jury and elect one person to both offices.
doc_text:
§1664.  Combining offices of treasurer and clerk of police jury
The police jury may combine the offices of parish treasurer and clerk of the police jury and elect one person to both offices.
